name: Goat
special_abilities: [{"name":"Charge","description":"If the goat moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a target and then hits it with a ram attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 2 (1d4) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 10 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone."},{"name":"Sure-Footed","description":"The goat has advantage on Strength and Dexterity saving throws made against effects that would knock it prone."}]
actions: [{"name":"Ram","description":"Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) bludgeoning damage.","attack_bonus":3,"damage_dice":"1d4+1"}]
